entry.title: Bitcoin covenants are inevitable
entry.summary: The email from Billy Tetrud raises a query regarding the classification of individuals as "technical" or "non-technical" within a specific discussion or context. He specifically questions the exclusion of 'alicexbt' and the sender themselves from the category of "technical folk." This indicates a need for clarity on how terms are defined and used when categorizing individuals' technical expertise or roles within a group or conversation. The inquiry suggests either a misunderstanding or a request for more precise criteria by which people are grouped, highlighting the importance of clear definitions and transparent communication in discussions that involve categorization of skills or roles.
